title: salix × cottetii
intro: Salix × cottetii, also known as Cottet's willow or hybrid willow, is a plant species in the family Salicaceae, resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The Salix × cottetii plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its salicylic acid content. The medicinal properties of the plant have been found to provide relief from pain, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. Salix × cottetii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
